reviews.title: This is not a luxury hotel, maximum 3 stars
reviews.text: First, the location is not centrally located. You have to walk about 15 minutes to get something to eat. The hotel restaurant is not good and expensive. The restaurant only turns on the AC when there is customer. The gym next to the pool is the worst condition, the machines are either damaged or unplugged. There is no water, no towel, and no AC. The place is filthy.  The executive suite we booked was not even in par with other hotel, the room is big, but everything is out dated and not in very good condition.  The main lobby is big, but it is dim and warm. It is probably the hotel wanted to save electricity for the AC and the light. The only thing good about the hotel is that the swimming pool is big. I am very disappointed and I will never return to this hotel again. There are definitely other better choices in Can Tho.
reviews.response:
Dear Mr Hilbert Moy
Warmest greeting from Mường Thanh Luxury Cần Thơ!
On behalf of the Management Board, we would like to express our great thankfulness for your staying at our hotel.
We have noted all your comments and our GM is looking into your problems. Also, we always try our best to give the guests good service so we need guest-comments to improve ourselves.  
We once again apologize for any inconvenience this may cause you and we hope that you will give us more opportunities to bring you better services for the next stay at our hotel.
With best regards,

Nguyen Hai Mai Han - Director of Sales

reviews.title: Never Comeback Again
reviews.text:
Dưới đây là một số nhận xét của tôi về kỳ nghỉ tại Ks Mường Thanh Cần Thơ:
- Tôi đến check in lúc 5pm, khi đặt trên Agoda, tôi đã đọc rõ mô tả phòng là phòng có 2 giường (1 đôi và 1 đơn), nhưng khi đến tôi được xếp vào phòng có 3 giường đơn, tôi đã yc đổi theo đúng như bk tôi đã đặt. Tôi được thông báo ngồi đợi để đổi phòng, mất tầm 20-30ph cho việc ngồi đợi trong khi nhân viên vẫn vui vẻ nói chuyện cười đùa với nhau.
- Khi lên nhận phòng thì tôi được sắp vào phòng 1704, bước vào phòng đã cảm nhận được mùi hôi kinh khủng không thể chịu nổi, tôi đt xuống lễ tân và yc đổi sang phòng khác, sau 15-20ph tôi đc đổi sang phòng 1720 (tôi nhớ ko rõ lắm), thì phòng này vẫn có mùi hôi như vậy, đến nổi tôi phải để hành lý ở đó và xuống sảnh ngồi để đỡ đau mũi. Tôi gọi cho Agoda yêu cầu huỷ bk nhưng sau 20ph đợi thì nhận đc email từ Agoda rằng họ đã liên hệ với Ks và tôi đã đồng ý nhận phòng và đã hài lòng với phòng mới, trong khi tôi thật sự ko hài lòng một chút nào về căn phòng. Khi tôi quay lên lại thì đc xếp vào phòng 1722, vì quá mệt nên tôi nhận phòng luôn.
- Hồ bơi không được xử lý sạch, chồng tôi sau khi xuống tắm về đã bị đỏ mắt đến hôm nay vẫn chưa đỡ.
- Đồ ăn sáng không xứng tầm ks 5*.
Tôi sẽ không bao giờ quay lại bất kỳ khách sạn Mường Thanh nào nếu đi du lịch.
reviews.response:
Thân gửi chị,

Thay mặt BGĐ Khách sạn Mường Thanh Luxury Cần Thơ xin gửi lời cảm ơn chị đã sử dụng dịch vụ Mường Thanh Cần Thơ dịp vừa qua. reviews.title: Very disappointing
reviews.text:
This hotel should NOT be listed as a 5-star hotel, or even a 4-star hotel. When we arrived the key to our room didn't work, and after staff unsuccessfully tries with new cards, we were given a different room. Meanwhile, we were sweating because they only air condition the rooms - the hallways are hot and humid. 
Once inside the room, it didn't improve. The bed was very uncomfortable. It dipped in the middle, and I could feel the coils through the mattress. The carpet had a few large brown stains on it - it just felt dirty. They hadn't refilled the shower gel or shampoo bottles, so I got out of the shower to use the hand soap. The next day the bottles weren't refilled and we had to ask the front desk to send some to our room. In addition to this, we ran out of toilet paper! 
The fitness center was hot and dingy.

reviews.title: Far From Luxury
reviews.text:
We're staying here for 4 nights during Tet, and, our stay isn't over yet. This Luxury version has failed to impress. We were shown 3 rooms at check-in; none were done up properly. The first one had hair on the couch, the third had hair on both bed-side lampshades and hair all over the bathroom floor! We asked for room cleaning in the afternoon, but, nobody attended to that request all day (they claim to provide room make-up till 9pm). The sheets weren't dusted, just tucked in today. The bathroom floor and basin weren't cleaned properly either.
We ate out & returned to find out that we weren't allowed on the rooftop bar w/o a food ticket to witness the fireworks.
Breakfast on Tet: Some of the food didn't look fresh.
We tried Creamy Pumpkin Soup with Garlic Bread. It came garnished with deep fried, super oily croutons; the soup dish was oily with fingerprints shining on the rim. And, the soup was turmeric yellow in colour; didn't look/ taste like pumpkin soup.
Highly Disappointed!

reviews.title: Sie werden sich auf gar keinen Fall wie ein VIP fühlen, das sind keine 5 Sterne!
reviews.positives: Das Hotel sieht auf den ersten Blick noch nach einem 5 Sterne Hotel aus, das Zimmer ist groß und sauber, das Bett und die Badewanne sind bequem. Manche Mitarbeiter geben sich Mühe. Die Lage ist gut, man kommt zu Fuß relativ schnell in die Stadt. Für den Preis kann man es aushalten. Wenn das Hotel nicht mit 5 Sternen und dem Weltklasseservice werben würde, wäre es nur halb so schlimm...
reviews.negatives:
Wir haben uns hier absolut nicht "wie ein VIP" gefühlt und die 5 Sterne können wir uns nicht erklären.

- Der "Weltklasseservice" ist lächerlich, niemand hat uns das Gefühl gegeben, dass wir hier willkommen sind. Besonders abschreckend fanden wir die Zimmerkaution (wurde in keinem anderen Hotel verlangt)

- Niemand kann vernünftig Englisch, zumindest von der Rezeption würde ich das erwarten

- Fragen werden an der Rezeption nur rudimentär beantwortet (sofern sie überhaupt verstanden werden), für vieles fühlt man sich hier nicht zuständig

- Im Wellnessbereich war die Rezeption unbesetzt und man hatte offenbar kein Interesse, uns eine Massage zu verkaufen, was schon an der unübersichtlichen Preistafel zu erahnen war

- Die Zimmerausstattung war okay, aber ich hatte auf meiner Seite keinen Schalter für die Nachttischlampe und auch keine Steckdose, das lief nur über das "Cockpit" auf der anderen Bettseite

- Ein paar mehr Handtücher im Bad und eine Ersatzrolle Klopapier hätten wir uns gewünscht, aber immerhin gibt's ein Telefon neben dem Klo, da kann man direkt Bescheid geben ;P Die Dusch-Wanne ist nicht die intelligenteste und lädt zu Überflutungen ein

- Unsere Minibar wurde nicht täglich aufgefüllt und wir mussten zwei mal darum bitten, bevor wir wieder Trinkwasser auf dem Zimmer hatten. Man muss selbst auf einem Zettel eintragen, wie viel man der Minibar entnommen hat, ein Stift ist allerdings nicht vorhanden

- Um den Pool zu erreichen, muss man einmal durch die Lobby und über den Parkplatz laufen, dabei hätte ich zumindest gern einen Bademantel angehabt, aber den gab es nicht. Separate Pool-Handtücher sind ebenfalls nicht vorhanden

- Auf den Fluren darf eigentlich nicht geraucht werden, dennoch waren ständig Zigaretten im Mülleimer und am 2.

It was terrible to hear that, they said sorry about so busy forgot to call us that we were left our passports, we don’t highly recommend this hotel!  Thanks

 Tran Yen Vinh - General Manager

reviews.title: Hotel review
reviews.text:
During my recent stay, I encountered several issues that impacted the overall experience:
	•	The breakfast selection was quite limited, with not many dishes available, making it underwhelming for guests expecting variety.
	•	The room did not come with an iron, and when I inquired at the front desk, the hotel informed me that they do not provide irons at all.
	•	The bed was not comfortable, which made it difficult to get a good night’s sleep.
	•	I requested an extra blanket for the additional bed, but the staff only provided a thin bedsheet cover, which was insufficient.
	•	Additionally, I noticed that the staff frequently engaged in personal conversations and chit-chat in areas where guests were present, which detracted from the professional atmosphere.
Overall, the hotel needs to improve its amenities and staff professionalism to provide a better guest experience.

reviews.title: Mixed feelings
reviews.text:
For sure not a 5 star resort and by that is not even a resort.

The good:
Good and plentiful breakfast.
Clean and well furnished room.
Location.

The bad:

Bad water pressure and if you like to take a hot shower or bath just forget about it, its barely just lukewarm. 

Extremely slow WIFI.

Hard as rock pillows.

Gym is inside a non air conditioned and dusty decrypt shack.

Pool area looks like from the 70's, nature is just taking over the place.

Arrogant staff, we ordered a breast of chicken from room service, the meat was like chewing on a sandal, so rubbery and tough and when we sent it back they had the audacity to call back to say there's nothing wrong with the dish instead of offering an apology.

Dated and aging building.

reviews.title: The quality does not meet the 5-star standard.
reviews.text:
The hotel is located in Cái Khế but is also quite close to Ninh Kiều Wharf and near nightlife spots.  
Advantages:  
- The rooms are quite spacious  
- There is a swimming pool  
- Breakfast is suitable for Vietnamese people with mostly traditional dishes  
Disadvantages:  
- The rooms are quite old, and the equipment is deteriorating  
- The hotel shares space with weddings and fairs, so there is too much foot traffic  
- Staff are unprofessional and cleaning is not good  
* There are many better options in the same 5-star category nearby, it is only advisable to stay for a one-night experience.
reviews.response:
Kính gửi anh Minh,
Khách sạn cảm ơn anh đã chia sẻ đánh giá. Chúng tôi rất vui khi anh hài lòng về vị trí, phòng rộng rãi, hồ bơi và bữa sáng phù hợp khẩu vị Việt. Đồng thời, chúng tôi xin ghi nhận và thành thật xin lỗi về những hạn chế liên quan đến cơ sở vật chất, tình trạng đông đúc và chất lượng phục vụ chưa như mong đợi. Các góp ý của anh sẽ được chuyển đến bộ phận liên quan để cải thiện trong thời gian tới. Rất mong có cơ hội được phục vụ anh tốt hơn.

Trân trọng,

Trần Mạnh Hùng
General Manager.

reviews.title: Staffs at the breakfast was unfriendly.
reviews.text:
We went there with a group 5 adults & got 3 double rooms included breakfast.  Four of my friends arrived first then I came later. When I arrived, there is no mat, no dine towel, no knife & fork ...so I asked one of the staff there can I have them? They said I have to go help it my self. Unbelievable,  how could be a 5 stars training staffs like that...??? Breakfast was only beef soup & breads were OK.. the rest were terrible. Cold cut was dumped. Not much choice at all. Everywhere in Vietnam, or other countries you could ask for two key. But there is no. I forgot the key inside the room ( on the wall ) because there is always other key they give you. But this hotel I even ask the second time for one more key... They told me that I come back to my room and they ask some one to open the door for me. I stood in front of door & waited for almost 7..to 10 mins. 

   I really pissed of with the way the hotel treated me... Will never consider to book there again.

reviews.title: Terrible wifi & below standard for a 5 star hotel
reviews.text:
I had a frustrating 4 days staying there due to intermittent problems with the wifi. Even when it worked, it was slow. It only worked well in the lobby. It was a problem since I do business on the internet. I repeatedly complained, but nothing changed.

The room size was ok, but the bed was not comfortable. The hardness of the bed hurt my back. Also, the shower leaked, so we had flooding in the bathroom every day.

Also, the breakfast buffet was only fair. It should be a lot better for a 5 star hotel. Choice was limited & staff mindlessly clear your table when going up for more food or drink.

On the plus side, the swimming pool is excellent though the jacuzzi does not work. The gym, however, is not so good. There should be a lot more equipment for a 5 star hotel. Also, the equipment is not maintained well enough.

reviews.title: Whirlpool bathtub not working for executive suite
reviews.text: My boyfriend and I spent 1 night at Can Tho during our trip in Vietnam and decided to go for executive suite at the hotel. looked  forward to a good hot bath. We found the bath seems not working and informed the front desk to take a look. We waited for 15 mins and called the front desk again and was advised they will send a staff in a minute, than wait for another 30 mins and came a maintenance staff. The staff did abit check and said it was out of order and it was like 10pm by that time. I suspect the bath was not just out of order but it has been no maintenance at all. The hotel should have let guest know if the facility is not workable before check in. I got the room at discounted price but it does mean the facilities could be discounted as well. I would have just opted for a double room instead and saved my time waiting on the staff for nothing.  Other than this, the hotel is generally clean and staff is friendly.

Your comments have been shared with our maintenance and front desk teams for immediate review, particularly regarding equipment upkeep and timely communication. We also take seriously your point about informing guests in advance if any in-room facilities are unavailable.
We truly regret the time you spent waiting and the frustration it caused. While we’re glad to know you found the hotel clean and our staff friendly, we understand this does not make up for the inconvenience experienced.
Thank you again for your valuable feedback. We hope to have another opportunity to welcome you

reviews.title: Doesn't feel like a 5-star hotel
reviews.text:
The room is nice and comfy. But the hotel doesn't really locate in the most crowded and central area of Can Tho City. The room interior is old. The wallpapers show signs of peeling, the light button is missing. However, what I dislike the most is the not-so-smart bathroom design. The basin counter is low and you have to bend all the way down just to wash hands. The faucets are too short for both the basin and the bathtub, resulting water to run all over the counter before reaching the floor like waterfall. You can't adjust the height and tilt level of the shower faucet. It literally shoots water directly to the opposite wall. All the water that is unintentionally on the floor doesn't just go away and in the following morning you can still find it there.  
So basically, even though the price is definitely affordable if you compare to other cities, but the quality is not really that of a 5-star hotel. We really expect more.

reviews.title: It is hard to give the hotel 5 stars this time
reviews.text:
The electricity and customer service here are the 2 big issues here. 
After removing the room key card, electricity will be shut down including the fridge. This is really annoying as our drink and kids' milk cannot be kept cold while we are not in the room. It takes a bit long time for the air-con to be started when we insert the key card.
No air-con or the conditioning system outside our room is not on or too low that we felt like we were outside, on the road when we get out of our room and on the way walking to lifts. Terribly hot in the hallway and inside all lifts.
No power during breakfast time on 28 Jan 2024. The hotel definitely used a generator. When we got back to our room, no air conditioning, no TV. 
 
We were very disappointed with the electricity issue in this 5-star hotel. As a 5-star hotel, should they try to save electricity as much as they can like that?

At check-in, I agreed to pay 800,000 vnd for 2 nights to upgrade our room fron Twins to Triple. Then a staff called us to explain that the correct rate should be 500,000 vnd per night. At first I was ok to pay at checkout. But then, my hubby was  not happy due to the incorrect information and inconsistent price. The front desk manager nicely explained to us. She said if we were not happy we would not need to pay the extra 200,000vnd. She added that they would let the staff who told us the wrong price pay for it. We definitely would not let her pay. We said we would pay instead of her. As a 5-star hotel, should they take into account those pennies like that? I think that manager should not say that to us for us to feel sorry for that staff. Even if they asked her to pay, the manager should not say that to us. We totally understand that the staff informed us the old price. We would have fully happy if the manager just explained the reason and mentioned that if we were not happy, we would not have to pay.

200,000 vnd or AUD12 is not a big problem to us and also for the hotel but that made us not happy with the professional customer service of Muong Thanh Luxury. I am loyal customer of Muong Thanh for years. I and my husband think this time they did not provide the excellent customer service

Thank you very much!

reviews.title: Beautiful views
reviews.text:
We stayed in an executive suite for 3 nights. The room was very big with two huge windows with stunning views. The bed was very confortable. The breakfast was very good. Also, we appreciated the location and liked walking from and to the centre of the town.
There were two main problems in this hotel. First, the cleaning service was almost inexistent. When we entered the room, there were lots of hair in the bathroom. The shower leaked heavily and there was water everywhere on the floor after a shower. Wehad to ask to dry the floor  because the room service did not do it on their own. Similarly, the did not wash teacups during cleaning. Honestly, it is unacceptable for a 5-star hotel. Secondly, the staff speaks very poor English. Impossible to order juice in the roof top bar or order bus tickets.

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.positives: Massive reception and guests waiting room, but not many people around.
reviews.negatives:
Front desk staff were unpleasant and not helpful. 
My room looked old, and there was no shower screen. 
Water leaked onto the bathroom floor after shower.
The hallway was dark and quite warm.
Breakfast was average and exactly the same food for the two night stay.
I don't think it's a 5-star hotel as rated.

reviews.title: It just ok but not worthy the price paid
reviews.text: Toilet flush not function well. Corridor at 9th floor didn't on or half on. Swimming pool not available after 7:30pm.

reviews.title: Frustratingly poor
reviews.positives: Rooms were a good size as was the pool , which was important to us
reviews.negatives:
Hotel is very tired and neglected and desperately in need of updating a maintenance.

Our initial room had a large cracked window and the shower flooded the bathroom because the pipe leaked badly.   After our persistence they changed our room ( having initially said they were full), and this was better.

Externally the pool is a good size but the whole area is neglected- the cabanas have tatty thatch that is falling apart and with netting trying to patch it up, there are broken tiles and tatty rattan chairs along with mismatched pool furniture.  This is a really large hotel but it had only around 15 sun loungers who’s cushions were absolutely filthy dirty too.

It could be a really lovely space but really isn’t up to scratch.

reviews.title: Nice hotel but bring your ear plugs
reviews.text: The room was comfortable and pool great. Great coffee at breakfast and just okay food. Fridge in room didn't work and shower drain was blocked. The location is other side of river from Central Can Tho. This was unfortunate as it was a very noisy area : a strip of open-air nightclubs with very loud music are right next to hotel. Avoid the restaurants along this strip also. In centre town much better food.
reviews.positives: The staff were very friendly and helpful. The lobby and pool are amazing. The view is great

reviews.title: Above average
reviews.positives: Very friendly reception staff, but very limited english speaking, it was a bit difficult to communicate
reviews.negatives: The massage was not relaxing and not well done. We did a massage in couple and the ladies were more concentrated in talking together than performing their job. We do not recommend.

reviews.title: Good money value
reviews.text: Great money value but the facility is bad, no AC in lobby, hallway & elevator, unbearable hot, breakfast is bad.
reviews.response:

Thank you for sharing your feedback with us. We are pleased to know that you found our hotel to be a good value for money. However, we sincerely apologize for the discomfort caused by the air conditioning issues in the lobby, hallways, and elevators, as well as for the breakfast experience not meeting your expectations. Your comments have been noted carefully and will be shared with the relevant departments for improvement. We truly appreciate your feedback and hope to have the opportunity to provide you with a better stay in the future.
Best regards,

Hoang Trung Duc
General Manager.

reviews.title: Not bad a hotel to stay.
reviews.positives: The room was renovated and modern. Nice size poor.
reviews.negatives: The refrigerator was not cold.  There was one pillow per person.  The hotel was isolated from local restaurants and other vendors. I had a bee in my soup during breakfast. Don’t like the fitness outside the hotel.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.text:
The location is convenient and the room is spacious, which made our stay quite comfortable.

However, the breakfast menu was almost the same every day, so it became a bit monotonous. In addition, the dining staff were sometimes slow in clearing tables, and on a few occasions they were chatting and laughing with each other while guests were still waiting. Some room amenities also seemed a bit old.

Overall, despite these drawbacks, the stay was acceptable and I would still recommend this place.
reviews.response:
Dear Ms Hồng,
Thank you for your feedback. We’re glad you enjoyed our convenient location and spacious room. We apologize for the repetitive breakfast, service delays, and the condition of some amenities. Your comments have been noted for improvement. Thank you for your recommendation, and we hope to have the opportunity to welcome you back with an improved experience.

Best regards,

Tran Manh Hung
General Manager.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.text: I paid the most for this hotel among all of my stays in Vietnam. So, this review reflects that. If I had paid half as much, I might feel differently.  The hotel was clean and expansive. But the bedding was by far the least comfortable of 6 places I stayed in Vietnam. It was a bit miserable. The spa was filled with men and cigarette smoke and definitely did not feel like a place for a teen girl and her mom. The staff was very friendly, but we could not communicate, so they could not be particularly helpful. I tried to explain where I wanted to go and they could not figure it out with me. If I spoke Vietnamese this might have been a different stay and a different review.

reviews.title: Safe choice
reviews.text:
I stay at Mường Thanh whenever I come to Can Tho. Day by day, Mường Thanh is becoming more energy-efficient; the check-in lobby in the afternoon has no lights, no fans, and no air conditioning. The breakfast buffet offers quite a few fewer dishes than before. I guess Mường Thanh is changing its customer segment. 

The view here is still beautiful, the rooms are still clean, and the swimming pool doesn't have a strong chlorine smell. This time, the check-in process was faster, and they no longer request a deposit or hold onto ID cards as before – this is a positive change here.

I will still return to Mường Thanh in Can Tho next time because it is a safe and suitable choice in Can Tho, although it no longer lives up to the 5-star sign hanging at the entrance.

reviews.title: Could be better, not five stars
reviews.text: The hotel is fine on some levels, rooms are clean, staff members are courteous; but, overall, do not be delusional to think it is a five star hotel. Breakfast is boring and below mediocre. The staff in the rooftop bar needs training, they are indifferent at best. The room service is excellent, which is very different from the breakfast. I ordered in for lunch almost everyday, excellent service and reasonable prices. The pool is average; the gym is not air conditioned. Overall, if you can get the agoda deal of under $50, it is totally fine, but keep expectations low, especially within the so-called five star designation.

Perhaps the management could revise some policies to extend breakfast past 9:30 a.m. and offer early check-in to business travelers when the hotel is obviously not at capacity during a low season.  If you want a quiet location away from the busy touristic zone, it's a nice choice.

reviews.title: Not a five star, but it is good value.
reviews.text: I am staying at this hotel long term (possibly for ten months and I am in my second month); it is not a five star hotel, so I am not sure how they designated themselves as such so don't be delusional when you book to think that it is a five star. It is a mega hotel with lots of domestic tourists. So you will hear lots of music throughout the day in the lobby, with weddings and large parties arranged in the mezzanine level. This is all fine if you don't use the lobby much or can find a time when it is not loud. Lobby is not air conditioned very well. The breakfast is mediocre at best, but fine if you only need eggs, everything else is boring and repetitive (and not very good). That's pretty much the negatives. The room service is actually very good if you order the VN food, cheap and prompt and reliably consistent. The staff are generally nice and courteous without being pushy. The bell guys are great and very helpful as well as the lobby cafe staff. The rooftop cafe is boring, staff can be dismissive and arrogant (which is weird; maybe level of courtesy goes down as you move up the elevators); the swimming pool closes at 8 pm, which is disappointing and they will try to kick you out at 7 so they can clean, but you need to tell the receptionist this. Overall, the hotel is fine if you keep to yourself and don't expect much. Other guests can be crass (local tourists, new money people with no sophistication but think they are at an ultra luxury hotel when in fact it is simply an average hotel). Rooms are very clean, air condition is the most powerful I have ever been in anywhere.
reviews.positives: room service, lobby cafe, and bell people
